assessment.note: The answer 'kids school closed' was a pivot to a personal context, not engaging with work-related friction.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Current work stressors
new_queue.name: What part of your workload feels like it's causing you to be late most often?
new_queue.description: Explores the underlying causes of consistent lateness, potentially revealing workload or time management issues.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Team dynamics
new_queue.name: How are you feeling about the team dynamics right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces any interpersonal issues that might be affecting team performance or personal stress.

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What do you need from me right now to help with your current workload?
new_queue.description: Opens up for Carl to express any specific support needs from the manager that could aid in managing workload or punctuality.

new_queue.label: Energy management
new_queue.name: What strategies are you using to maintain your energy levels throughout the week?
new_queue.description: Probes for personal strategies in place to manage energy and avoid burnout.

new_queue.label: Role clarity
new_queue.name: How clear are you on your role and its current priorities?
new_queue.description: Assesses Carl's understanding of his role and whether it aligns with team and company goals.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: Where do you see opportunities for growth in your current projects?
new_queue.description: Encourages Carl to identify areas for personal and professional growth within his current role.
